name: Mrs.lind's Butter Balls (Butter Glace)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the breadcrumbs and butter together until well combined.
2. Add the cream, allspice (if using), and eggs to the mixture. Stir until thoroughly mixed.
3. Refrigerate the dough until it is completely chilled.
4. Roll the chilled dough into balls approximately the size of walnuts.
5. Drop the butter ball-sized pieces into chicken and noodle soups during the last 15 or 20 minutes of cooking time.
